title: Character Kill Roleplay
description: The mod is used when you need your player to change name after each death
body:
Hello,

In my server i wanted a behaviour like the user need to change name after each death


Here is how it WORK :
![NewDeathScreen change name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c01af5d3efd6d014114a65f5e1c9d9348ed116c9.png)
![Name is in tchat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ae737bd10ef9c702dfe2cb9ba3abd388dfa0f7f.png)

This mod use the code of Styled-nicknames of Patbox to rename the player so you can

-> Specify the format of the displaying name in the config file styled-nicknames.json
-> Choose to display the name changed in the player list tab in the config file 
-> beneficit of others options of styled-nickname

Thanks to PatBox
